overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a covered urban walkway, climbing scaffolding, and exploring a sunlit rooftop in a dystopian futuristic city. The environment features overgrown vegetation, damaged modern architecture, and construction cranes against a bright blue sky.

events.description: passes by an NPC leaning against the right wall, temporarily blocking partial view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the shadowed covered walkway, looking ahead toward the light at the end

notable_agents.action: leaning against the concrete wall with arms crossed, watching the street below

entered.detail: dark metal beam ceiling with rectangular panels creating striped shadows
black metal railing overlooking the street level below
smooth dark concrete wall of the adjacent building
futuristic curved building with reflective glass facade visible through the railing
green construction crane towering above the distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit covered walkway with a metal beam ceiling overhead. To the left, a metal railing overlooks a street with sparse traffic and dystopian buildings overgrown with vegetation. An NPC leans against the right wall as the character passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area at end of covered walkway approaching scaffolding

events.description: emerging from deep shadow into brighter light as the walkway opens toward the sky
approaching the end of the covered walkway where scaffolding structure becomes visible

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the walkway, approaching the scaffolding structure at the end

notable_agents.action: seated on a chair against the wall, facing the street view

entered.detail: orange metal scaffolding structure blocking the end of the walkway
tall red industrial structures visible in the distance
tall palm trees growing among the urban ruins

segments.scene_description: The walkway gradually opens to the sky, transitioning from dark shadows to bright sunlight. The character approaches an orange scaffolding structure at the end of the path while passing a seated NPC. Distant red industrial buildings and palm trees become visible ahead.

events.description: character climbs over the railing and begins ascending the scaffolding structure
reaching the top of the scaffolding and stepping onto the rooftop level

agents.ego_description: climbing up the metal scaffolding, moving from the walkway level up to the rooftop

entered.detail: metal grate walkways and platforms of the scaffolding structure
tall concrete wall topped with green vines and vegetation
panoramic view of futuristic skyscrapers and construction cranes

segments.scene_description: The character climbs the orange metal scaffolding, transitioning from the enclosed walkway to an open-air ascent. The camera looks up at the concrete wall topped with vegetation, then over the city skyline with multiple construction cranes visible against the blue sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rooftop with concrete pergola structures and construction debris

events.description: approaching an area with active fire and smoke rising from burning debris
passing behind concrete pillars temporarily obscuring the view ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across the rooftop, navigating around equipment and structures toward a standing figure

notable_agents.action: standing still wearing a beige trench coat, facing the approaching character

entered.detail: flat concrete rooftop with puddles and scattered debris
concrete pergola beams forming a partial roof structure overhead
large industrial HVAC unit with metal casing
large white satellite dish mounted on the roof
rusted corrugated metal sheets forming barriers
active flames and black smoke rising from debris

segments.scene_description: The character explores the open rooftop with concrete beam structures overhead, passing air conditioning units and a satellite dish. Active fire burns in the distance with smoke rising. The character approaches a standing NPC in a trench coat near the edge of the roof, with futuristic skyscrapers towering in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a dimly lit urban corridor into the bright, open expanse of a futuristic rooftop. It begins within a shadowed covered walkway under metal beams, passing a leaning NPC while overlooking a street of vegetation-overgrown buildings. As the path opens to the sky, the lighting shifts from dark shadows to brilliant sunlight, leading the camera past a seated NPC toward an orange scaffolding structure and distant red industrial buildings. The scene then transitions into an open-air ascent up the metal scaffolding, glancing up at concrete walls topped with greenery before revealing a skyline dominated by construction cranes against a blue sky. Finally, the camera moves across the rooftop past air conditioning units and a satellite dish toward a figure in a trench coat, with smoke from distant fires rising against a backdrop of towering skyscrapers.
